title: Add -i to exec for compatibility reasons
body:
No change to functionality

Resolves: #606

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude Can you remove the "Resolves:"? We really ought to implement `exec -i` properly at some point
well it does resolve the issue ... what word would you prefer?
@baude I don't feel like it does, given that properly resolving the issue would be implementing `-i`. Maybe we should make a new issue for that, though...

:pushpin: Commit 245986d has been approved by `rhatdan`
